summary: Analytics Dashboard Testing Complete - All new features working. Tested Top Clients, Agency Comparison, and AI-powered Revenue Forecast endpoints and frontend pages for both super-admin and agency-admin roles.

GET /api/admin/stats/top-clients.details: Returns list of top clients by revenue with id, name, email, total_spent, bookings, rating. Works for both super admin (global) and agency admin (scoped)

GET /api/admin/stats/agency-comparison.details: Returns agency revenue comparison with id, name, revenue, bookings, vehicles. Super admin only - agency admins correctly get 403

GET /api/admin/stats/revenue-forecast.details: Returns AI-powered forecast with historical data, forecast array with confidence scores, analysis text, trend (up/down/stable), total_vehicles, avg_daily_price. Uses GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations

GET /api/admin/stats/advanced.details: Returns detailed stats including daily_revenue, weekly_trends, vehicle_utilization, payment_methods, cancellation_rate

Super-admin /super-admin/statistics page.details: All sections render: KPIs, Daily Revenue, Weekly Trends, Vehicle Utilization, Top Revenue per Vehicle, Payment Methods, Revenue by Month, Agency Comparison, Top Clients, AI Revenue Forecast

Agency-app /agency-app/statistics page.details: All sections render: KPIs, Daily Revenue, Vehicle Utilization, Top Revenue, Payments donut, Top Clients, AI Revenue Forecast with trend and predictions

test_classes: TestTopClientsEndpoint - 3 tests (super admin, agency admin, unauthorized)
TestAgencyComparisonEndpoint - 3 tests (super admin, forbidden for agency, unauthorized)
TestRevenueForecastEndpoint - 3 tests (super admin, agency admin, unauthorized)
TestLoginCredentials - 3 tests (super admin, geneva admin, lausanne admin skipped)

response_structure.analysis: String - AI generated analysis in French

ai_forecast_verified.gpt_5_2_integration: Working - Uses emergentintegrations.llm.chat LlmChat with model openai/gpt-5.2
ai_forecast_verified.frontend_display: Shows combined historical+forecast chart, trend indicator, analysis text, confidence percentages

critical_code_review_comments: All analytics endpoints properly scope data by agency_id for non-super-admin users
Agency comparison endpoint correctly restricted to super_admin role only (403 for others)
AI forecast gracefully handles empty historical data and API key issues
Frontend statistics pages properly display all data with charts and trend indicators
context_for_next_testing_agent: Analytics dashboard features fully functional. Top Clients, Agency Comparison, and AI Revenue Forecast (GPT-5.2) all working correctly. Super admin sees global stats, agency admins see scoped stats. AI forecast shows historical + 3-month predictions with confidence scores.

agency_app_statistics_full.png - Agency statistics with AI forecast section visible
